info.name: Numark NS7III
info.author: djcmd project
info.description: Complete RE-verified mapping from Serato process memory dumps 2026-04-10. Channel layout: Ch1(0x90/0xB0)=mixer/global, Ch2(0x91/0xB1)=deck0, Ch3(0x92/0xB2)=deck1, Ch4(0x93/0xB3)=deck2, Ch5(0x94/0xB4)=deck3. Platter: CC0=position(7-bit wrapped), PitchWheel=timestamp(14-bit); touch via PLL slip detection. Motor: CC67=0 ramped-start, CC65=2 instant-start, CC66=3 instant-stop, CC68=1 ramped-stop, CC69=RPM(0=33/1=45), CC70=dir(0=fwd/1=rev), CC105=PLL pitch correction. Pitch fader: CC1 MSB + CC33 LSB (14-bit, center=8192, deadzone ~0.1%). SYNC=note50, SHIFT=note53, REVERSE=note63, SLIP=note68, CENSOR=note62(was wrongly jogTouch). Note64=pitch_is_zero LED output only (not input). Note61=pitch_range cycle.
